protocol.name: wlr_foreign_toplevel_management_unstable_v1
protocol.copyright:
Copyright © 2018 Ilia Bozhinov
Permission to use, copy, modify, distribute, and sell this software and its documentation for any purpose is hereby granted without fee, provided that the above copyright notice appear in all copies and that both that copyright notice and this permission notice appear in supporting documentation, and that the name of the copyright holders not be used in advertising or publicity pertaining to distribution of the software without specific, written prior permission. The copyright holders make no representations about the suitability of this software for any purpose. It is provided "as is" without express or implied warranty.

interface.name: zwlr_foreign_toplevel_manager_v1
interface.description: The purpose of this protocol is to enable the creation of taskbars and docks by providing them with a list of opened applications and letting them request certain actions on them, like maximizing, etc.

event.name: toplevel
event.description: This event is emitted whenever a new toplevel window is created.

request.name: stop
request.description: Indicates the client no longer wishes to receive events for new toplevels.

event.name: finished

description.summary: the compositor has finished with the toplevel manager

event.description: This event indicates that the compositor is done sending events to the zwlr_foreign_toplevel_manager_v1.

interface.name: zwlr_foreign_toplevel_handle_v1
interface.description: A zwlr_foreign_toplevel_handle_v1 object represents an opened toplevel window. Each app may have multiple opened toplevels.

description.summary: requests that the toplevel be maximized
requests that the toplevel be unmaximized
requests that the toplevel be minimized
requests that the toplevel be unminimized

event.name: state
event.description: This event is emitted immediately after the zlwr_foreign_toplevel_handle_v1 is created and each time the toplevel state changes.

event.name: done

description.summary: all information about the toplevel has been sent

event.description: This event is sent after all changes in the toplevel state have been sent.

description.summary: request that the toplevel be closed
the rectangle which represents the toplevel
types of states on the toplevel

event.name: closed
event.description: This event means the toplevel has been destroyed. It is guaranteed there won't be any more events for this zwlr_foreign_toplevel_handle_v1.

description.summary: request that the toplevel be fullscreened
request that the toplevel be unfullscreened
